name: FNB ETN on APPLEC SEP25
summary: FNB ETN on APPLEC SEP25 is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) issued by First National Bank (FNB) tracking the performance of Apple shares with an expiration date in September 2025. The ETN provides investors with exposure to Apple's stock price movements without directly owning the shares. It allows investors to participate in the potential gains (or losses) of Apple stock.
